zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Pateshull於1342年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾時，她的父親Sir John De Pateshull51歲，母親Mabilia Grandison49歲。她於1363年與Sir John de Lee在英國賀特福爾阿爾布瑞結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1420年在英國史洛普爾享年78歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Pateshull于1342年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾时，她的父亲Sir John De Pateshull51岁，母亲Mabilia Grandison49岁。她于1363年与Sir John de Lee在英国賀特福爾阿爾布瑞结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1420年在英国史洛普爾享年78岁。

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Pateshull was born in 1342, in Northamptonshire, England, her father, Sir John De Pateshull, was 51 and her mother, Mabilia Grandison, was 49. She married Sir John de Lee in 1363, in Albury, Hertfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1420, in Shropshire, England, at the age of 78.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Pateshull est née en 1342, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John De Pateshull, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Mabilia Grandison, avait 49 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John de Lee en 1363, à Albury, Hertfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1420, à Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 78 ans.

de.Stanton upon Hine Heath, Shropshire, Eng: Stanton upon Hine Heath, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Pateshull 1342 in Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John De Pateshull 51 und ihre Mutter Mabilia Grandison 49. Sie hat 1363 in Albury, Hertfordshire, England Sir John de Lee geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1420 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Shropshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Pateshullが1342年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir John De Pateshullは51歳，母Mabilia Grandisonは49歳であった。1363年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアアルブリーでSir John de Leeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1420年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアで78歳で死去した。

ko.Stanton upon Hine Heath, Shropshire, Eng: 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 스탠턴 업 이인 히스
ko.lifeSummary: Joan Pateshull(이)가 1342년 영국 노르섬프토실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John De Pateshull(은)는 51세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mabilia Grandison(은)는 49세였다. 그녀는 1363년 영국 허트퍼드실르 알버이에서 Sir John de Lee(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1420년 영국 슈럽실르에서 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Pateshull nasceu em 1342, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John De Pateshull, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Mabilia Grandison, tinha 49 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John de Lee em 1363, em Albury, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1420, em Shropshire, Inglaterra, com 78 anos.

ru.Stanton upon Hine Heath, Shropshire, Eng: стантон упон хаин хит, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Pateshull родилась в 1342 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John De Pateshull было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Mabilia Grandison, 49. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John de Lee в 1363 г. в местности албури, хиртфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1420 г. в местности шропшир, Англия в возрасте 78 лет.

Se casó con Sir John de Lee en 1363, en Albury, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1420, en Shropshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 78 años.
